comment: Single source of truth for the expected public contributor identity. Gates read from here instead of hardcoding. To migrate to a different org-level account, edit this file and re-run the gate chain. Individual contributor handles MUST NOT appear here.

targetMigration.comment: When the modernai org is provisioned, edit the fields above to: owner='modernai-release-bot', ownerEmail='<bot-id>+modernai-release-bot@users.noreply.github.com', repo='modernai/modern-skills'. Then re-run the gate chain. The git history rewrite + GitHub repo rename happens in coordination with this edit.
